title: More Snow
description: This mod allow snow to be deposited on blocks such as sapling, flower, slab and stairs to make the snow covered landscape of winter even more beatiful.
body:
Adds more snow to BTA. Inspired by Snow! Real Magic!.  
With this mod snow now can deposite on block such as saplings, flower, tall grass, fences, slab, stairs and many more to create a beatiful winter landscape.  

Original mod by [Helinos](https://github.com/Helinos/More-Snow)  
This is an update.
